title: Promotional Banner Component Schema
description: Schema for the PromotionalBanner CMS component. Defines the data contract between the ops configuration center and the mobile wallet runtime.

title.title: 横幅标题
title.description: Main text displayed on the banner
examples: Take the onboarding quiz and earn a chance to win a prize

imageUrl.title: 图片资源 URL
imageUrl.description: URL of the banner image asset. If empty, a default gift icon is shown.

ctaLink.title: 跳转链接（深链接）
ctaLink.description: Deep link navigated to on banner tap

rules.title: 组件约束与条件
rules.description: Display rules controlling visibility, behaviour and distribution targeting

priority.title: 优先级
priority.description: Banner display priority. 0 = hidden. Higher value = shown first in carousel.

manualClose.title: 允许手动关闭
manualClose.description: Whether to show a close (×) button on the banner

targeting.title: 推送范围 (Targeting)
targeting.description: Distribution targeting conditions. Empty arrays mean 'all'.

platforms.title: 推送平台
platforms.description: Target OS platforms. Empty = all platforms.

networks.title: 推送网络
networks.description: Target blockchain networks. Empty = all networks.

versions.title: 推送版本
versions.description: Target app versions. Empty = all versions.

layout.title: Layout Spec (JSON-Render)
layout.description: Optional json-render Spec. When present, Sandbox renders the banner dynamically via @json-render/react instead of the default hardcoded template.

root.description: Key of the root element in the elements map

elements.description: Flat map of element keys to element descriptors

type.description: Component type name (must exist in the banner registry)

children.description: Ordered list of child element keys

x-tca-trigger.description: TCA trigger config is a sibling field alongside this payload at runtime. Not part of payload schema validation.
